title: Inventor Automation and Drawing Output Quick-Start Kit

star.situation: An engineering team repeats Inventor model, iProperty, drawing, BOM, and package-output work, but manual steps keep leaking time.
star.task: Create a public-safe quickstart that proves the model/package contract before a native Inventor API or iLogic adapter is used.
star.action: Bundle approved NIST IPT/STEP fixtures, validate package metadata, represent BOM and iProperty rules, and show C#, iLogic, and VB.NET adapter examples.
star.result: Reviewers can run the public kit, see package readiness, and discuss the native Inventor automation path without private models.

fixtures.license: NIST unrestricted test case material; no endorsement implied
fixtures.attribution: NIST MBE PMI test case model

fixtures.license: NIST unrestricted test case material; no endorsement implied

developmentPreviewWarning: This CAD library is in development. This is an early public preview for feedback on the best business case, workflow shape, and proof path.
publicBoundary: Public kit contains approved public fixtures, code examples, validation reports, and native adapter scaffolds only.
